description: Arrival time must be after departure time
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE arrival_at <= departure_at
business_impact: Invalid time sequences indicate data entry errors or system clock issues

description: Average speed must not exceed a realistic maximum for vessels
business_impact: Unrealistic speeds may indicate errors in distance or time recording

description: Latitude must be between -90 and 90, and longitude between -180 and 180
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE departure_lat < -90 OR departure_lat > 90 OR departure_lon < -180 OR departure_lon > 180 OR arrival_lat < -90 OR arrival_lat > 90 OR arrival_lon < -180 OR arrival_lon > 180
business_impact: Invalid coordinates can mislead route tracking and analysis

description: Distance should be consistent with speed and time
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE distance_nm < (EXTRACT(EPOCH FROM (arrival_at - departure_at)) / 3600) * avg_speed_knots
business_impact: Inconsistent distance can cause errors in voyage performance analysis

description: Fuel consumption must be within realistic bounds for voyage distance
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE heavy_fuel_oil_cons < 0 OR heavy_fuel_oil_cons > distance_nm * 0.1
business_impact: Incorrect fuel data affects operational efficiency analysis

description: Cargo quantity must be zero when the vessel is in ballast condition
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE is_ballast = TRUE AND cargo_qty_mt > 0
business_impact: Inaccurate cargo data can distort cargo handling metrics

description: Anomaly type must be specified if is_anomaly is true
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE is_anomaly = TRUE AND (anomaly_type IS NULL OR anomaly_type = '')
business_impact: Lack of anomaly type information can hinder issue resolution

description: Departure and arrival ports must not be null
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE departure_port IS NULL OR arrival_port IS NULL
business_impact: Missing port information affects route planning and tracking

description: Created and updated timestamps must be in correct format and not null
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE created_at IS NULL OR updated_at IS NULL
business_impact: Missing timestamps can affect data integrity and change tracking

description: Distance, average speed, and cargo quantity must be non-negative
sql_check: SELECT * FROM voyage_performance WHERE distance_nm < 0 OR avg_speed_knots < 0 OR cargo_qty_mt < 0
business_impact: Negative values indicate entry errors that affect operational metrics
